blueprint.name: BNK on IBM Cloud ROKS (roksbnkctl)
blueprint.description: Provision a ROKS/IKS cluster on IBM Cloud and deploy F5 BIG-IP Next for Kubernetes using the roksbnkctl tools-runner container. Everything runs inside a digest-pinned image — no host tooling required.

outcomes: A ROKS/IKS cluster provisioned in the selected IBM Cloud region (optional — an existing cluster can be reused)
F5 BIG-IP Next for Kubernetes installed and running on the cluster
Deployment outputs captured in the module state for follow-on modules

prerequisites.name: IBM Cloud API key
prerequisites.description: IBM Cloud API key available as an ibmcloud credential in BNK Forge.

prerequisites.name: BNK entitlement
prerequisites.description: BNK entitlement (FAR archive / subscription JWT) per the roksbnkctl documentation.

modules.name: roksbnkctl tools runner
modules.description: Runs roksbnkctl init/cluster up/bnk up (v1.20.0, non-interactive env-driven workspace) inside the pinned tools-runner image; destroy runs roksbnkctl down.

required.name: region
required.label: IBM Cloud region
required.description: IBM Cloud region for the ROKS/IKS cluster (e.g. us-south).

required.name: resource_group
required.label: Resource group
required.description: IBM Cloud resource group the workspace resources are created in.

required.name: prefix
required.label: Resource prefix
required.description: Resource-name prefix for everything this workspace creates (e.g. acme-eu).

required.name: cluster_name
required.label: Cluster name
required.description: Name of the ROKS/IKS cluster to create or target.

optional.name: provision_cluster
optional.label: Provision cluster
optional.description: When false, an existing cluster is reused instead of provisioning a new one.

optional.name: deploy_bnk
optional.label: Deploy BNK
optional.description: When false, only the cluster is provisioned.
